questionHtml: Discuss how the motion of the molecules of a gas gives rise to pressure in the gas.
markschemeHtml:
The momentum of a molecule changes when it collides with a container wall ✓

From F=ΔpΔt and Newton’s third law, this leads to a force exerted on the wall by the molecule ✓

The average force exerted by all the molecules on a unit area of the wall is equivalent to pressure ✓

meta.title: Discuss how the motion of the molecules of a gas gives rise to pressure in the gas.
